mnemonics: Mary's Purple Elephant Loves Testing Most Often Now
My Precious Elephant Learns Testing Mightly Often Now
keyPoints: Black Box Testing: Focuses on inputs and expected outputs, without knowledge of the internal workings of the system.
White Box Testing: Involves examining the internal workings of the system, testing both code and design.
Gray Box Testing: Combines elements of black box and white box testing, involving a combination of both.
Agile Methodology: Emphasizes flexibility, collaboration, and iterative development, with an emphasis on continuous testing and feedback.
